actions.title: Set Alternate Description  (OpenAI)
actions.name: pdfix_generate_alternate_text_openai
actions.desc: Automatically generates alternate text for Figure and Formula tags using OpenAI, embedding it into each tag’s Alt attribute [Cloud]

args.title: Prompt
args.name: prompt
args.desc: Prompt used to generate alternate text.
args.value: Output only alt text in {lang} for screen readers for the tagged Figure or Formula: one or two short sentences on subject and visual role. Use appended surrounding-tag data for context only; do not quote or repeat it. No prefix or markdown. Surrounding tag data:

set.value: Output only alt text in {lang} for screen readers for the tagged Figure or Formula: one or two short sentences on subject and visual role. Use appended surrounding-tag data for context only; do not quote or repeat it. No prefix or markdown. Surrounding tag data:

Output only alt text in {lang} for the tagged Figure or Formula. Use appended surrounding-tag data for context only; do not quote it. Objective description: layout, key objects, readable text summarized, important color or material cues if visible. Allow several sentences for complex figures; avoid subjective mood unless clearly shown. Do not start with Image of or Picture of. No prefix or markdown. Surrounding tag data:

Output only alt text in {lang} for the tagged Figure or Formula. Use appended surrounding-tag data only to infer topic; do not quote it. Factual description woven with concise topical keywords and proper nouns visible in the image so search and assistive tools capture the main entities and purpose. Do not start with Image of or Picture of. No prefix or markdown. Surrounding tag data:

args.title: Overwrite
args.desc: Replace the alternate text if it exists
args.name: overwrite

args.title: Tag Name
args.name: tag_name
args.desc: Tag name defined by a regular expression

args.title: Surrounding Tag Count
args.name: tag_count
args.desc: How many surrounding tags are included into prompt for AI. For Number 2 1 before and 1 after is taken. Custom prompt does not fill surrounding tags.

actions.title: Set Alternate Description (OpenAI)
actions.name: pdfix_generate_alternate_text_from_image_to_text_openai
actions.desc: Automatically generates alternate text from an image file using OpenAI, saving the description to a text file [Cloud]

args.name: output_txt
args.desc: Output TXT file containing alt text

args.title: Prompt
args.name: prompt
args.desc: Prompt used to generate alternate text.
args.value: Output only the alt text in {lang} for screen readers for the tagged Figure or Formula: one or two short sentences on subject, layout, and purpose; quote visible text only if needed for meaning. Do not start with Image of or Picture of. No prefix, markdown, labels, or extra commentary.

set.value: Output only the alt text in {lang} for screen readers for the tagged Figure or Formula: one or two short sentences on subject, layout, and purpose; quote visible text only if needed for meaning. Do not start with Image of or Picture of. No prefix, markdown, labels, or extra commentary.

Output only alt text in {lang} for screen readers for the tagged Figure or Formula: vivid objective description including composition, notable colors or lighting, materials, actions, readable text summarized as needed. Allow richer length for complex scenes; avoid invented emotions. Do not start with Image of or Picture of. No prefix or markdown.

Output only alt text in {lang} for screen readers for the tagged Figure or Formula: factual description with natural topical keywords and proper nouns readable in the image so search and assistive systems retain main topics, roles, and data highlights. Do not start with Image of or Picture of. No prefix or markdown.

actions.title: Set Alternate Description from MathML (OpenAI)
actions.name: pdfix_generate_alternate_text_from_xml_to_text_openai
actions.desc: Automatically generates alternate text from an XML file using OpenAI, saving the description to a text file [Cloud]

args.name: output_txt
args.desc: Output TXT file containing alt text

args.title: Prompt
args.name: prompt
args.desc: Prompt used to generate alternate text.
args.value: Output only plain-language alt text in {lang} for the tagged Formula in the supplied MathML: one or two short sentences for screen readers, no markup or labels in your reply.

set.value: Output only plain-language alt text in {lang} for the tagged Formula in the supplied MathML: one or two short sentences for screen readers, no markup or labels in your reply.

Output only plain-language alt text in {lang} for the tagged Formula described by the supplied MathML: objective reading of structure, variables, operators, and relations; paraphrase readable values briefly. Allow several sentences for complex expressions. No markup, prefixes, or headings in your reply.

Output only plain-language alt text in {lang} for the tagged Formula in the supplied MathML: weave standard math vocabulary, notation names, and domain terms that appear or are clearly implied so retrieval tools capture meaning; stay factual. No markup in your reply.

actions.title: Set Formula MathML  (OpenAI)
actions.name: pdfix_generate_formula_mathml_openai
actions.desc: Automatically generates MathML for Formula tags using OpenAI, attaching it as an associated file to each tag [Cloud]

args.title: Prompt
args.name: prompt
args.desc: Prompt used to generate formula's MathML.
args.value: Output only valid MathML {math_ml_version} for the tagged Formula: one well-formed math root with namespace matching the rendered expression, every tag closed, no prose outside MathML. Use appended surrounding-tag data only to disambiguate; do not paste that text into the MathML. Surrounding tag data:

set.value: Output only valid MathML {math_ml_version} for the tagged Formula: one well-formed math root with namespace matching the rendered expression, every tag closed, no prose outside MathML. Use appended surrounding-tag data only to disambiguate; do not paste that text into the MathML. Surrounding tag data:

Output only valid MathML {math_ml_version} for the tagged Formula: prefer explicit mrow, mfrac, msup, msub, munder, mover, and munderover so structure is fully spelled out; well-formed, namespace-correct, complete, matching the image. Use surrounding-tag data only to disambiguate; do not insert that text. Surrounding tag data:

Output only valid MathML {math_ml_version} for the tagged Formula: unambiguous, operator-explicit markup mirroring the image for parsers and downstream tools; well-formed single math root with namespace, no commentary. Use surrounding-tag data for disambiguation only; do not include that text in output. Surrounding tag data:

args.name: tag_name
args.desc: Tag name defined by a regular expression

args.title: Surrounding Tag Count
args.name: tag_count
args.desc: How many surrounding tags are included into prompt for AI. For Number 2 1 before and 1 after is taken. Custom prompt does not fill surrounding tags.

actions.title: Set Formula MathML (OpenAI)
actions.name: pdfix_generate_formula_mathml_from_image_to_xml_openai
actions.desc: Automatically generates MathML from an image file using OpenAI, saving it as an XML file [Cloud]

args.name: input_jpg
args.desc: Input image file containing picture of formula

args.name: output_xml
args.desc: XML file containing MathML representation of formula

args.title: Prompt
args.name: prompt
args.desc: Prompt used to generate formula's MathML.
args.value: Output only valid MathML {math_ml_version} for the tagged Formula: a single well-formed root declaring the MathML namespace, matching the expression in the image, every tag closed, no markdown, prose, or text outside the MathML.

set.value: Output only valid MathML {math_ml_version} for the tagged Formula: a single well-formed root declaring the MathML namespace, matching the expression in the image, every tag closed, no markdown, prose, or text outside the MathML.

Output only valid MathML {math_ml_version} for the tagged Formula: one complete well-formed math root with namespace; expand implicit operations into explicit mrow, mfrac, msup, msub, munder, mover, or munderover where needed for clarity; match the image fully. No text outside MathML.

Output only valid MathML {math_ml_version} for the tagged Formula: explicit operator-rich, well-formed MathML mirroring the image for maximal machine interpretability; namespace-correct single math root, no commentary.
